arts.ttl: Man City injury news: Manuel Akanji to miss Real Madrid second leg, will he be absent for Liverpool?
arts.sum: Manchester City defender Manuel Akanji will miss the second leg of their Champions League second leg against Real Madrid next Wednesday with a muscular injury.

arts.ttl: WORLD'S GREATEST!: Ronaldo tops Messi, Mbappe and Neymar in top 100 athletes list
arts.sum: Benzema’s $108m salary with Al-Ittihad marks his status as the ninth-highest paid player in world sport despite only making $8m annually with endorsements – the third lowest in the top ten ahead of boxers Fury and Oleksandr Usyk. Cristiano Ronaldo has once again been named the highest-paid athlete in the world, beating out rivals such as Lionel Messi, Neymar and Kylian Mbappe .

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham chasing Real Madrid salary increase
arts.sum: Representatives of Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham have reportedly approached Real Madrid over a contract extension.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti makes Real Madrid history during Champions League victory over Manchester City
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti is undoubtedly one of the best managers that Real Madrid have ever had, and he continues to show that during his second spell in charge at the Santiago Bernabeu.
